summary: All 4 reported bugs verified FIXED. Comprehensive testing completed for Ceraldi ERP iteration 7: (1) Fatture table headers now have dark text (#1e293b) on light background (#f1f5f9), (2) Cespiti page shows 21 cespiti with 'Scan Fatture XML' button, (3) Dashboard Volume Affari shows non-zero values (€103,349.41 total), (4) Contabilita Hub shows Piano dei Conti with non-zero saldi. All backend APIs return correct data.
